title: Update containers/storage and containers/image
body: This bumps the versions of containers/storage and containers/image that we use, and updates the shortcuts that we take when committing to local storage to compensate for assumptions that it made which are no longer true (now it makes different ones).

comments.body: ![](https://github.trello.services/images/mini-trello-icon.png) [(13) Teach containers/image to take advantage of newer containers/storage features](https://trello.com/c/plhzr6ez/561-13-teach-containers-image-to-take-advantage-of-newer-containers-storage-features)
I hit the easy to understand stuff, have to rely on the Test suites for the rest. LGTM
